message:
🐛 Fix RunDot popup clipping and hover disappearing (#1194)

- Convert popup to React Portal (renders at document.body) so it's
  never clipped by parent overflow containers
- Use timeout-based hover with 150ms delay so users can move the
  mouse from the dot to the popup without it disappearing
- Track dot position via getBoundingClientRect for portal placement

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
